description: Consensus-oriented reasoning contract for multi-agent proposal comparison, voting, aggregation, and final selection under governance constraints.

propose.description: Generate candidate proposals or options from the current decision context.

vote.description: Collect preference, ranking, or support signals over a set of candidate proposals.

aggregate.description: Aggregate ballots into a consensus state that captures support, disagreement, and selection confidence.

select.description: Select the final decision from the aggregated consensus state.

metadata.notes: Representative contract for consensus-style reasoning providers in the [&] Protocol.
